description: Refactor stage plan validation cases for R0-R4 contract.

cases.planText:
## R0 Discover
### SSOT table
| State | Owner |
| Health | UHealthComponent |
### Impact files
- Source/Game/HealthComponent.h
- Source/Game/Character.cpp
### Risks
- Duplicate health on Character
### Staged patch plan
- R1 approval gate for public API
- R2 one implementation slice
- R3 callsite rewire
### Human approval gate
Stop before code edits until reviewer approval.
Stage R2 approved implementation slice after human approval gate. Move impl to files a.h a.cpp b.h b.cpp c.h c.cpp d.h d.cpp e.h e.cpp then build with UBT.
R1 boundary: add IHealthInterface.h with query API only. No cpp bodies yet.
Rewire PlayerController to call UHealthComponent. Files: Controller.h Controller.cpp. Verify with UBT build.
